commit.message:
opus-2026-03-07-S32: DEFORMED EULERIAN NUMBERS — complete closed-form for a_k(T)

a_k(T) = A(n,k) + sum_I 2^{parts(I)} * c_k^{(f_I, n-1)} * I(T)

where c_k^{(f,d)} = sum_j A(f+1,j) * C(d-f, k-j) * (-1)^{d-f-k+j}

Verified at n=5 (75 checks) and n=7 (140 checks), all exact.
Key insight: transitive tournament gives standard Eulerian numbers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: Bot C backtest — stop loss check sur LOW au lieu de CLOSE

Corrige le bug classique de simulation : le stop ATR trailing et le
Donchian exit étaient déclenchés sur le close de la bougie, ignorant
les mouvements intraday. Désormais le low est utilisé pour vérifier
si le stop a été touché (réaliste : un ordre stop se déclenche quand
le prix atteint le niveau, pas à la clôture).

Impact attendu : MaxDD plus élevé (-12% à -18% vs -6.6%), Sharpe
normalisé (~1.8-2.2 vs 2.88).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(ml): skip prediction counter sync when dataset is empty on startup

When the ML dataset is empty (new session or after feature changes), the
old prediction counters from paper_trading_state.json are meaningless -
they come from a model that no longer exists. Skip the sync so the
dashboard shows 0/0/0% instead of stale 66.7% from a previous session.
Counters accumulate fresh once the model retrains and makes predictions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Phase 2 — Shift constraint, Fade mode, HUD, Board mode, Spotlight

1. Shift constraint:
   - Hold Shift while drawing Line/Arrow → snap to 0°/45°/90°
   - Hold Shift while drawing Rect/Circle → constrain to square/circle
   - Uses flagsChanged() for real-time modifier tracking

2. Fade mode (Space to toggle):
   - Annotations auto-fade after 2 seconds
   - 30fps timer-driven fade animation
   - First half: full opacity, second half: linear fade out
   - Auto-cleanup of fully faded annotations

3. Floating HUD:
   - Shows current tool, color, width, active modes
   - Appears at top center on any key press
   - Auto-hides after 2 seconds
   - Dark pill-shaped background with rounded corners

4. Board mode (W to cycle):
   - None → Whiteboard → Blackboard → None
   - Whiteboard: solid white background
   - Blackboard: dark gray background

5. Cursor Spotlight (K to toggle):
   - Dark overlay with clear spotlight circle following cursor
   - 60px radius with soft glow edge
   - Uses CGContext blend mode for clean cutout

commit.message:
Fix L9: correct overstated Phase 6 dependency on Phase 5

Bond auctions (reserve-circuit) and lending (deposit-circuit) are
independent mechanisms. Phase 6 only needs banks with reserve accounts
from Phase 3, not lending infrastructure from Phase 5. Phases 5 and 6
can now be parallelized.

Major milestone: extend computational verification from k≤200 to k≤665
via 465 new native_decide cases (FiniteCasesExtended + Extended2).

Asymptotic bound framework (AsymptoticBound.lean):
- gamma_ge_fortieth (γ ≥ 1/40): PROVED via tangent at 2/3
- gap_implies_crystal_lower: PROVED via Legendre + log bounds
- crystal_bound_non_convergent: sorry (assembly comparison)
- crystal_bound_convergent: sorry (factorization case)

Also includes:
- Section 8 (Blocking Mechanism) in preprint_en.tex

commit.message:
fix(viewer): preserve projectId and req params across stage transitions

Stage transitions (S2→S3, S3→S4, S4→S5, S4→S3) were losing URL
parameters, causing PRD loading failures and "prd.json not found"
errors. Now all navigation uses URLSearchParams to consistently pass
both req and projectId. Also adds Stage3Content useSearchParams() to
read projectId directly from URL, and installs missing shadcn card
component.

commit.message:
feat(strategy): per-suggestion chat actions to add or update canvas nodes (#1094) (#1102)

Replace the global "Add to Canvas" button with per-suggestion action
buttons that detect whether a condition already exists on the canvas:
- "Update Node" (amber) when matching condition_type exists
- "Add New" (blue) for new conditions
- Green checkmark with correct label after action

Key implementation details:
- actionStates stores 'added'|'updated' to preserve correct label
  after reactive re-renders
- Index-based mapping with condition_type validation fallback
- Params merge (spread existing + incoming) to prevent data loss

commit.message:
Fix: use webUtils.getPathForFile() instead of removed file.path

In Electron 35+, File.prototype.path was removed. ImagePicker was
using `file.path` to get the absolute path of selected images,
which returns undefined in Electron 40, causing all configured
image paths to be saved as empty strings.

- preload.ts: expose webUtils.getPathForFile via contextBridge
- ipcClient.ts: add getPathForFile to ElectronAPI type definition
- ImagePicker.ts: replace file.path with window.electronAPI.getPathForFile(file),
  remove now-unused ElectronFile interface

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(e2e): replace getByRole('link') with locator filter across all specs

getByRole('link', { name: /pattern/ }) fails for complex card links where
accessible name computation doesn't match expected text (nested h3, badges).
Replaced with locator('a').filter({ hasText: /pattern/ }).first() which
reliably finds anchor elements by text content.

Additional fixes:
- layout.tsx: Make PonyLab logo a Link to /dashboard (fixes logo-nav test)
- role-access.spec.ts: Add exact:true to 研究方向 heading (strict mode fix)
- experiments-crud.spec.ts: Wait for templates or empty state before asserting
- helpers.ts: Fix navigateToExperiment/navigateToProject to use locator filter

commit.message:
fix: return 422 instead of 409 for pathless artist operations (#421)

* fix: return 422 instead of 409 for pathless artist operations (#415)

requireArtistPath and requireImageDir returned HTTP 409 Conflict when an
artist had no filesystem path. 409 indicates a resource state conflict
(concurrent edit, duplicate creation), not a precondition failure. 422
Unprocessable Entity is semantically correct: the request is well-formed
but the entity cannot be processed due to missing configuration.

Closes #415

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: update smoke test assertions from 409 to 422

The smoke test script still asserted 409 for NFO diff, NFO conflict, and
image fetch endpoints when the artist has no filesystem path. Update to
match the new 422 status code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
feat(engine): v2.11 analysis engine parity with macOS reference

Port 9 platform-independent fixes from macOS bug reports:
- Remove F2 (unused by HMM latent axes)
- Key repeat detection (HashSet) & is_typing_key() filter
- BS penalty threshold 8→14 + IME guard
- β_writing recalibration (F1:220→100, F3:0.08→0.10, F4:2.0→2.5, F5:4.0→1.0)
- Independent 1Hz gate via Instant-based scheduling (no drift)
- Ongoing silence F5 augmentation
- Silence-break protection (3-keystroke gate after 10s silence)
- Remove force_flow_state() (was destroying HMM state during IME)
- Fix session start race condition (reset before active)
- update_silence() now updates EWMA with dynamic α (0.15/0.25)
- Synthetic friction early onset (8s/15s) with floor values

Drop nginx proxy, serve landing page only; services link to public URLs

service is accessible via its own Railway public domain.

fix: ExcelJS → SheetJS(xlsx) 교체 — 브라우저 번들 스트림 버그 근본 해결

ExcelJS 브라우저 번들(dist/exceljs.min.js)의 Browserify PassThrough 스트림이
불안정하여 workbook.xlsx.load()에서 model.sheets=undefined crash 발생.

- ExcelJS 제거, SheetJS(xlsx) 설치 (Edge Function에서 이미 사용 중인 검증된 라이브러리)
- parseExcelFile: XLSX.read() 기반으로 재구현 (스트림 불필요, 동기식 파싱)
- 번들 크기 54% 감소 (940KB → 430KB), 빌드 시간 5배 단축
- toCellScalar: SheetJS 셀 타입 (s/n/b/d) 기반으로 재구현
- 테스트 138/138 통과, TypeScript clean
